MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing is present. Represented by Valerie Simpson.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Hannah Lyster is present.
Attorney Marilyn Underwood representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Curtis Karnow, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 608, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of DEC-27-2011 is vacated.
